productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Kids Boys Printed White Tshirts
description: Composition White full-sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has foldover sleeves with mid-sleeve buttons, tipped collar, stitch detailing above the two pockets on either chest, print on the back and a full length button placket Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Dress your little boy in this shirt from gini and jony and watch him play a game of soccer like a pro. The cut adds a hint of smartness to this shirt, while the fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with shorts and sneakers for that uber cool and comfy look.
